name: Email Gmail Trigger - Newsletter & Alert Router

reply_markup.inline_keyboard: ={{ JSON.stringify([ [ { text: '🔒 Security', callback_data: 'email:security-agent:' + $json.cbKey }, { text: '📣 Marketing', callback_data: 'email:marketing:' + $json.cbKey } ], [ { text: '💰 Sales', callback_data: 'email:sales-researcher:' + $json.cbKey }, { text: '📋 PM', callback_data: 'email:product-manager:' + $json.cbKey } ], [ { text: '❌ Ignore', callback_data: 'email:ignore:' + $json.cbKey } ] ]) }}
